why: The residual FNs are largely small, dense, obscured, or structure-piece targets where local resolution and crop adjudication are safer than broad prompt recall.

tile_policy.crop_padding: include enough context to distinguish separate targets from fragments
tile_policy.merge: map crop boxes back to image coordinates and pass through existing pp045c-safe postprocessing plus verifier gates

class_targets.smoke_or_debris_obscured: crop verifier only, with conservative reject rules
class_targets.building_or_structure_piece: manual visual review and verifier design, not automatic add
class_targets.unknown: FiftyOne or contact-sheet review before live model work
